name: ASRock B760M PG RIPTIDE Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-7200(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock B760M PG RIPTIDE Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR5 support and M.2 Wi-Fi slot.
